title: MxSxC1 End Crystal Beam Resource Pack
description: Modified The End Crystal & End Crystal Textures. Resource Pack For The Incoming Beam, Vision & Void Data Packs.
body:
# MxSxC1 End Crystal & End Crystal Beam Texture Pack (Alpha)

[The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow](https://www.miscreat.co.uk/)
## **Pack Purpose**

### This pack will replace the existing End Crystal & Beams with new textures. However this pack also provides multiple options for both crystals and beams. This is Alpha so some of these are not yet released, but will be soon.

![Image of End Crystal Beams and End Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375b56bdf44d22f3bd96aa407e05e828f27024a4.jpeg)

This pack will add specific textures for use with "The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow" Data Packs and maps. See below for a list of packs that will be (or are) using this.

_NOTE: This pack is currently set to have the beam set to full purple solid. Other options and colours are available within this pack. However, some of the options, colours and animations are still being tweaked. The pack will be updated ASAP, and we will include a full tutorial on how to change these settings soon! See notes below for more details._

## **Crystals**
- Original
- No Base (this is covered in the data pack so not required once data pack available)
- Vivid (partial transparency)
- Frame Only (No Pink)
- Lighter Pink (partially transparent, for use with certain shaders)
- Lots more incoming including multiple colours to match beams.

## **Beams**
**Note Alpha and Transparency will not likely work due to limitations hardcoded within game (WIP finding a solution)**
- Original
- Purple Solid
- Purple Transparent (WIP will show as opaque in most cases, or be an on or off toggle)
- Alpha - Original with Alpha
- Alpha Black - Original Black with Alpha
- White Format - Use this to make your own colours (saves you a step)
- Orange - Doesn't Look Great (WIP)

For more information on planned and WIP and Lazer Beams (look awesome and are animated) see further down or check YouTube for videos (incoming).

## SPOILERS!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
These Packs contain scenes, structures, events, bosses, pets, weapons, armour, items, quotes, and other information based on "The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow". 

If you plan to read the books, these are early versions of scenes from books which are not yet finalised. They relate to scenes which have not even been written yet in some cases, and these packs are being used to create The New Empire & The Universe in order to write the books. Some are related to books which are years away in the story. There are HUGE spoilers here.

With some guesswork (and not much) it will be possible to work out some major spoilers for the books, fight bosses, have pets, meet characters, and visit scenes for which even if you have read the first book, they aren't in the books yet.

THE PACKS CONTAIN MAJOR SPOILERS!

</details>

## Summary Of Textures
- End Crystal (with multiple options)
- End Beam

TODO:
- Multiple Animations Incoming (some look crazy, see below)
- Transparency (believe this is a yes/no flag, incoming and included in videos)
- Better Beams - Multiple Colours & Variations
- Better Crystals - (Multiple Colours & Special Effects)
- Linked Conduit Pack - will be separate pack
- Void Dragon - wll be separate pack

Everything Else in TODO will be Data Pack Related or within other packs.


**Notes For Alpha / Future / Issues**

We have tested in around 15-20 Shader Packs, all using Iris.
This pack on its own works fine. However for our combined Resource Pack which also implements in-game Mojang shaders - you may have issues with Sodium/Iris errors for some combinations. That is NOT the case for this pack. This pack DOES NOT implement shaders.


## **Lazer Beams (Not yet available will potentially be separate pack)**

**Each of these will be available in multiple versions**
## 1. Type 
_   LEGEND:_ 

           ^   means they will have animated version.
           ao  means animated ONLY
           h means there will be a high quality version (hope you have a top level gfx card)
           map means there will be nmap and smap versions including glowing effects (not managed to get this working so far so none flagged so far)

-   Solid
-   Single Beam ^ h     
-   Twin Beam ^ h
-   Quad Beam ^ h
-   Split Beam ^ h
-   Data Stream ao h
-   Broken Data Stream ao h
-   Data Stream Minimal ao h
-   Random ao h
-   Void Beam ao h
-   Poison ao h

## 2. Colours
-   Make Your Own (instructions will be provided)
-   White
-   Black
-   Purple
-   Ice Blue
-   Void Blue
-   Orange
-   Void
-   Magenta
-   Red
-   Hellfire

### ## Related Incoming Data Packs
This version is specifically for the following for which at the moment, none of these have been released (or are in alpha):
- Vision Pack (this is due for release very soon)
- Beam Control  (this is due for release very soon)
- Circles & Orbits (basic alpha ready)
- The Void Battle
- Orbital Bombardment
- The Arena
- The Time Machine (this is due for release very soon)
- Bees & Flowers (Proof Of Concept for The Swarm. Farming, Villagers, Bees, Flowers? Boring?)
- The Swarm (This is not due for release any time soon! Once you've learned the basics of farming, your bees are turned into space ships with the ability to destroy planets, galaxies, then universes!)

#THIS IS ALPHA SOME OF THE TEXTURES ARE INCORRECT AND ARE THERE FOR TESTING PURPOSES AND TO ALLOW YOU TO SWITCH BETWEEN VARIATIONS#

This DOES NOT cover even a small percentage of all the textures you see in our videos.

### **Steps To Install & Update**

Drop the folder/zip into your resource packs folder.
```
C:\Users\[UserName]\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks\
```
Activate it with resource packs. (Or F3+T to update while in game)


**Notes / What This Pack Is Not / Or Not Yet**

This pack does not include the custom shaders (which do not use mods or shader packs but in-game Mojang functionality). That will be in a separate pack.

Note that our videos and screenshots use around 40 resource packs and 50 data packs, most unreleased, this pack does not include a lot of what you might see. That is clarified within each pack.

This is not the Data Packs. The Data Packs will be released separately and control of events, beams, etc...will require those packs or your own pack (others are available which cover some of the techniques we use).


---

[Miscreat Website](https://www.miscreat.co.uk/ 'miscreat.co.uk')

[GitHub][https://github.com/MxSxC1/](https://github.com/MxSxC1/)

We do not create mods, we create resource and data packs within Mojang framework, which will work on Realms.

Never install any packs, mods, or anything without fully understanding what they do, and ensuring it's legitimate and safe! If anything requires elevation (which ours do not), think twice and verify!

**The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow**
